title: Walfos 2 Pack Universal Silicone Pot Lid Replacement Knob, Heat Resistant Pan Lid Holding Handles,BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe, Great for Slow Cookers, Skillets and Kitchen Cookware Covers
description:
About this item
LONG-LASTING POT LID KNOBS REPLACEMENT - Compared to the plastic pot lid knob, WALFOS universal silicone pot lid handle is sturdy and long-lasting, and won't broke or crack. Also the soft and ergonomic design make you comfortable to grip the pan lid knobs. An ideal choice to replace your old or broken ones.
HEAT RESISTANT & NON-SLIP - WALFOS BPA free and food grade silicone pot lid handle replacement is heat resistant up to 450°F, making you stay cool to touch and prevent your hand from being injured. Moreover, the NON-SLIP silicone allows you to easily lift your lid. No more worrying about getting scalded or easily slipping the lid off.
VERSATILE - Whether it's an oval or round lid, whether it's a tempered glass or stainless steel lid, this pan lid handle will work, suitable for slow cookers, skillets, kettles, saucepans, frying pans, etc., meeting most lids with a mounting hole (Please make sure the hole diameter is larger than the diameter of the silicone washer-7mm).
EASY TO INSTALL & CLEAN - Come with 1 x knobs, 1 x screws, 1 x silicone washers and 1 x stainless steel washers, you can install the silicone pan lid handle replacement by your yourself without any trouble. And the non-stick spot lid replacement knobs are super easy to clean, dishwasher safe or you can just rinse with water.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - We are so confident you'll think we have the best knobs for pots on the market. If you have the slightest problem with our product, please feel free to give us a message and we will send you a new one right away without any cost on your side or full money back. We go out of our way to make sure every customer is happy and satisfied with our product and service. Order now, safe and secure, with Amazon Prime.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Purchased a stainless steel steamer pot, but the lid handle is metal and gets too hot to touch. I purchased this handle as a replacement. It works great. It stays cool to the touch. The design is easy to hold and the lip that contacts the pot lid is flexible and makes a tight water proof seal. Highly recommend.I am very happy with this replacement pot lid knob. It fit the lid quite well, it seems to be a good quality, doesn't get hot. It was easy to attach to the lid.Worked perfect for my lid on my crock pot.Very easy to attach to my lid and fits perfectly!!I was devastated when my original lid handle broke to my large skillet. I jumped on Amazon to see how I could replace it and found this little knob. It works perfectly!These knobs are amazing, they are designed to conform to the shape of the lid. I am also very impressed with the quality.I was saddened when the knob on my slow cooker broke. I was about to replace the entire crock pot when I thought to look on Amazon to see if that was something they sold. Lo and behold. They sold a universal replacement knob. It fit perfectly and saved me some money.Got this to replace our Tatung rice cooker's lid handle/knob. The original started to get loose because the plastic inside started to crack. This fits using the old screw from Tatung's no issue. So far it's worked well, and the silicone knob does not get hot even right after using the rice cooker.So glad I got this! It works perfectly!Fits perfectly on our glass pot lid, all parts included.
reviews_1s:
Purchased walfos silicone knob to replace metal knob on a heavy duty Dutch pot that got too hot to handle when cooking. After installing the silicone knob, was very wobbly. Come to find out, the threads that hold the knob in place are made out if plastic. Really Walfos? Very disappointed, ive had many other Walfos silicone lids that ive been very happy with which was why i purchased with confidence. Will be returning.It is not compatible for lifetime potI don't know what to do with them since came only the knobs. No screws, nothing else. So dissapointed!Play Video
I was looking forward to replacing the broken plastic pan top knob with a silicon knob, but found that the screws supplied are too narrow to thread into the knob. I will see if I can find screws that match the knobs, but may also need to find larger gaskets/washers if the correct screws are too big for the supplied washers.I did not receive the hardware 2 screw the handle on to my lid only the handle in the box.The screw does not fit the knob. It is far too small in both length and diameter. Terrible product.screws were impossible to use. had to go to hardware store and find screws to make this work.The handle is hollow with no bolt for the screw to attach to. It’s unusable because it can’t be attached to the lid.Super annoying that the screws don’t fit and we had to find ones that did.The inside of the handle melted and the lid fell off!
